summary: DBS Register feature fully tested and verified. All features working correctly - DBS Register page accessible from sidebar, shows all employees with DBS status, Last DBS Check date, Next Review Due date, stats summary, and Certificate/Update Service badges. Employee Profile DBS card shows consistent status with DBS Register (single source of truth verified).
passed_tests: ✅ DBS Register page accessible from sidebar navigation
✅ DBS Register shows all 7 employees with DBS status
✅ DBS Register shows Last DBS Check date column
✅ DBS Register shows Next Review Due date column
✅ Stats summary correct: 7 Total, 4 Current, 2 Cert Only, 0 Pending, 0 Due Soon, 0 Overdue, 1 Missing
✅ Needs Attention filter shows 1 employee (Ramon Akinsanya with Missing status)
✅ Certificate and Update Service badges displayed in Details column
✅ Olakunle Alonge shows 'Current' status with Next Review 28 Mar 2027 (364 days left)
✅ Employee Profile Audit Quick View shows DBS card with 'Current' status - CONSISTENT with DBS Register
✅ Employee Profile DBS card shows Next Review Due date (3/28/2027)
✅ DBS status values consistent between DBS Register and Employee Profile (single source of truth verified)
✅ Search filter works correctly (tested with 'Olakunle' and 'Ramon')
✅ Status filter dropdown works with all options (All, Current, Certificate Only, Pending, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: get_employee_dbs_summary() function correctly implemented as single source of truth
DBS Register endpoint properly uses get_employee_dbs_summary() for each employee
Employee Profile correctly uses dbs_summary from compliance-requirements API
All data-testid attributes properly added for testing (dbs-register-page, dbs-register-table, dbs-search, dbs-status-filter, dbs-status-card)
Status badges correctly styled with appropriate colors (green for Current, amber for Cert Only, red for Missing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: DBS Register feature fully implemented and tested. Key employees: Olakunle Alonge (Current status, Next Review 3/28/2027), Ramon Akinsanya (Missing status). Stats: 7 Total, 4 Current, 2 Cert Only, 1 Missing, 1 Needs Attention. Single source of truth (get_employee_dbs_summary) working correctly - same status shown in DBS Register and Employee Profile.

verification_details.consistency_verified: Olakunle Alonge shows 'Current' with Review: 3/28/2027 in both DBS Register and Employee Profile
